cases.title: Registration assigns Registered when seats are available
preconditions: Event is in RegistrationOpen state with configured capacity greater than current Registered count
Registration window is active (current time between registrationOpenAt and registrationCloseAt)
Authenticated participant has no active registration for the event
Waitlist is irrelevant because seats remain available
steps: Invoke registrationService.register(eventId, participantId, actorContext) for a participant with no prior registration
Read the returned registration entity snapshot
cases.expected: Registration is created with state Registered, waitlistPosition is null, and Registered count is incremented by one without exceeding EventCapacity

cases.title: POST registrations returns Registered and registration-status reflects it
preconditions: Published event with registration opened, capacity 5, zero existing Registered participants
Valid participant JWT
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations with Authorization bearer token and empty or token-derived body
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 200 with body containing state Registered, registrationId, eventId, participantId, reasonCode null, and updatedAt; GET registration-status returns the same registration with state Registered

cases.title: Participant registers via UI and sees Registered status
preconditions: Event visible on participant discovery list with registration open and available seats
Participant logged in with no existing registration for the event
steps: Navigate to event detail page for an open event with available capacity
Click register (or equivalent primary registration action)
Observe registration status area on event detail and/or my registrations list
cases.expected: UI shows registration succeeded with Registered status (badge, label, or status text) without requiring page reload beyond normal client refresh

cases.title: canRegister permits registration when window active and no active registration
preconditions: Event state is RegistrationOpen
Registration is not paused
Current time is within registration open/close window
Participant has no active registration state for the event
steps: Call canRegister(eventState, registrationPaused, openAt, closeAt, existingRegistrationState, now) with preconditions above
cases.expected: Function returns true, indicating the participant may initiate registration while seats are available

cases.title: Last available seat assigns Registered without exceeding capacity
preconditions: Event capacity is N with exactly N-1 participants already in Registered state
Event is RegistrationOpen with active registration window
New participant has no active registration
steps: Register one additional participant via registrationService.register
Query count of Registered participants for the event
cases.expected: New registration has state Registered; total Registered count equals EventCapacity exactly (N); no overflow beyond capacity

cases.title: Registration rejected when outside registration window despite available seats
preconditions: Event has available seats (Registered count below capacity)
Current time is before registrationOpenAt or after registrationCloseAt (fixed clock)
Participant has no active registration
cases.expected: Registration does not succeed; API returns semantic validation error (422) indicating registration window violation; no new Registered record is created

cases.title: Registration rejected when event is not RegistrationOpen
preconditions: Event is Published but registration not yet opened, or registration is closed/paused
Seats are available by capacity count
Authenticated participant with no active registration
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations while event state disallows registration intake
cases.expected: HTTP 409 or 422 with typed error; response body state is not Registered; no seat consumed

cases.title: Idempotent registration retry returns consistent Registered snapshot
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen with available seats
Participant authenticated with no prior registration
Fixed Idempotency-Key value prepared for the register endpoint
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations with Idempotency-Key K and receive Registered response
Repeat POST with the same Idempotency-Key K and identical payload
cases.expected: Both responses return HTTP 200 with the same registrationId and state Registered; only one Registered seat is consumed

cases.title: Successful registration persists atomically within capacity guard transaction
preconditions: Event with capacity 5 and zero Registered participants
Database transaction boundaries enabled for registration module
steps: Complete a successful registration assigning Registered state
Query seat holder count and registration row in the same database session
cases.expected: Registration row exists with state Registered and Registered count equals 1; BR-03 invariant holds (Registered count never exceeds EventCapacity) immediately after commit

cases.title: Flow A lifecycle register step yields Registered at start of participant journey
preconditions: E2E fixture: draft event created with capacity 5
Organizer transitions event through publish and open-registration
Fresh participant token and idempotency key
steps: Execute Flow A step: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations after open-registration
Continue scenario only after verifying registration state
cases.expected: Registration response state is Registered, enabling subsequent check-in, feedback, and eligibility steps in the lifecycle flow
